title: ferray-strings: missing functions — swapcase, rfind, index, rindex, partition, rpartition, rsplit, splitlines, translate, expandtabs, mod, encode, decode, slice
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's strings module provides functions that ferray-strings is missing: swapcase (swap case of each char), rfind (find from right), index/rindex (like find but raise on not found), partition/rpartition (split into 3 parts at first/last separator), rsplit (split from right), splitlines (split by line boundaries), translate (character translation table), expandtabs (expand tab characters), mod (printf-style formatting), encode/decode (charset encoding), slice (substring by index). ferray-strings has: upper, lower, capitalize, title, center, ljust, rjust, zfill, strip, lstrip, rstrip, find, count, startswith, endswith, replace, split, join, add, multiply, plus regex_ops (match_, extract). The most impactful additions would be partition/rpartition, rfind, and swapcase.
